Skip the gate

The answers
already exist.

Tax. Housing. Healthcare. Defence. Most of what Australia argues about has a coherent, costed solution. The platform that holds them together as one system is on the other side of this button.

“It’s easy to do the right thing once you’ve tried everything else.”

The fix everything button is real, and you have found it.

Independent Front
Economic Social Infrastructure Sovereignty Reforms For Candidates Talk to us
A mechanism to take over Australia

Australia, rebuilt.
Five parts. Twenty-eight policies.
One coherent system.

The Front is a non-partisan policy institute. The platform on this site is a total reconstruction of Australian policy — every levy, every program, every line of public expenditure — designed from the ground up to be implementable within the Westminster system Australia inherits and within a single term of government. It is calibrated against the legal frameworks of the Commonwealth, the states, and the public service that has to deliver it.

Tax leads: four transparent levies replace the entire existing tangle and return roughly $18,000 gross to the average household. The rest of the platform follows from that foundation. Independent candidates can adopt the whole of it, or any single section, to govern aligned on the big economic and structural questions while remaining accountable to the local concerns that won them their seats. The mechanism bypasses the structural failure of a two-party system that no longer reliably represents the people in the seats it holds.

I

The Economic Foundation

Four transparent levies replace the entire tax tangle. A $280 billion Sovereign Wealth Fund deploys $14 trillion across two decades. The budget runs at structural surplus from 2035. Welfare is reset for a country where work pays.

Tax · SWF · Budget · Welfare
II

Social Services

Healthcoverall replaces Medicare and private insurance with a single $230B/year program. 1.4 million purpose-built aged care homes. Education, NDIS, Veterans, and Indigenous Affairs rebuilt around outcomes, with delivery measured in service, not in process.

Healthcoverall · Aged Care · Education · NDIS · Veterans · Indigenous
III

Infrastructure & Productivity

66 CANDU 6 reactors. 15,000 km of new heavy rail. Four million homes on former defence land. The Basin Sequestration Strategy. National insurance reform. The bones of a country that builds again.

CANDU/Rail · Housing · Electricity · Insurance · Net Zero
IV

Sovereignty

Fortress Australia: a defence force sized to the geography it has to defend. DFAT dissolved; four diplomatic posts that matter. Immigration capped at a level the country can house, train, and absorb.

Defence · Foreign Affairs · Immigration
V

Enabling Reforms

A justice system that closes cases. Emergency services upgraded to a continent-scale standard. The federal-state fiscal relationship rebuilt so the GST removal does not defund the people who run hospitals and schools.

Justice · Emergency Services · States Funding
The platform at a glance

The numbers that hold it together.

$770B
Annual revenue, four levies
25%
Tax burden of GDP, down from 29%
$280B
Sovereign Wealth Fund seed
$18K
Avg. household income, restored
4M
Homes on former defence land
66
CANDU 6 reactors
$230B
Healthcoverall, every year
650 Mt
CO₂-e sequestered annually by 2045

Join the network.

The Front is building a list of Australians who want the country fixed and intend to be part of how that gets done. Not voters counted in aggregate. Not a polling base. Individual citizens, recognised by name, kept across what the platform is doing and what is being asked next.

Your email stays with the Front. No third-party sharing.

Support the work.

The Front does not run candidates, take corporate sponsorship, or collect membership fees. It is funded by individuals who want this platform in front of as many independent candidates and voters as possible. Contribution channels are being set up. Leave your details to be notified when they go live.

No payment is taken on this form. You'll get an email when the contribution channel opens.

Running as an independent?
Govern with the platform.

A non-partisan policy institute. The Front does not run candidates, does not collect membership fees, declares no conflicts of interest.
